summary: Iteration 21: Verified 3 bug fixes in Resume Optimizer - (1) PDF output per-template CSS, (2) Contact info sizing 9pt, (3) Bold template red badge headers. All fixes confirmed via code review. Frontend flow tested: upload->analysis->Fix My Resume->preview. Visual template selector (Bold, Classic, etc.) requires payment to access, so verification was done via code review.
passed_tests: Frontend: Resume optimizer page loads at /resume-optimizer
Frontend: Upload PDF functionality works - file is accepted and processed
Frontend: Analysis step shows Strengths, Weaknesses, Missing Keywords, Suggestions cards
Frontend: Score rings display Overall Score and ATS Score
Frontend: Fix My Resume button exists and is clickable (data-testid='quick-fix-btn')
Frontend: Backend template cards show in analysis step (tpl_executive, tpl_modern_tech, tpl_ats_max, tpl_career_change, tpl_compact)
Frontend: Resume preview loads after clicking Fix My Resume
Frontend: Paywall modal appears for unpaid users (data-testid='resume-preview-paywall')
Code Review: handleDownloadPDF (line 399-502) has tplStyles object with per-template CSS for all 8 visual templates
Code Review: PDF contact info uses 9pt font (.resume-contact{font-size:9pt}), body uses 10pt, name uses 18pt
Code Review: Bold template PDF: headerBg='#dc2626', headerColor='#ffffff', headerPad='4px 10px', headerRadius='4px'
Code Review: renderHtmlContent (line 32-119) applies Bold template-specific h2 style with bg:red, color:white
Code Review: Plain text Bold template rendering (line 289) uses 'bg-red-600 text-white font-bold rounded inline-block'
Code Review: RichEditor has 9 FONT_COLORS in toolbar (Black, Dark Gray, Blue, Navy, Teal, Red, Amber, Green, Purple)
Code Review: Visual template selector (line 762-775) uses VISUAL_TEMPLATES array with 8 templates (classic, modern, executive, minimal, bold, elegant, corporate, creative)
critical_code_review_comments: BUG 1 FIX VERIFIED: handleDownloadPDF (line 407-417) defines tplStyles object with unique styling per template - accent colors, header backgrounds, fonts all differentiated
BUG 2 FIX VERIFIED: PDF CSS has font-size hierarchy: name=18pt, body=10pt, contact=9pt (line 423-424)
BUG 3 FIX VERIFIED: Bold template in renderHtmlContent (line 50-51) applies h2 style with bg:#dc2626 (red), color:#fff (white), padding, border-radius
BUG 3 FIX VERIFIED: Plain text Bold template (line 289) uses Tailwind classes 'bg-red-600 text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded inline-block'
Visual template selector correctly maps to VISUAL_TEMPLATES constant with 8 options
Template selection persists via activeVisualTemplate state variable
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified 3 bug fixes: (1) handleDownloadPDF now uses per-template tplStyles object for PDF output differentiation, (2) Contact info in PDF is 9pt vs 10pt body text, (3) Bold template headers have red background (#dc2626) with white text in both renderHtmlContent and plain text rendering. Visual template selector (classic, modern, bold, etc.) appears only after payment in Step 4 full access mode. Backend templates in Step 2 are different (tpl_executive, tpl_modern_tech, etc.) and are server-side options.

bug_1_pdf_template_styling.details: tplStyles object defines unique accent, nameColor, headerBorder, headerBg, headerColor, headerPad, headerRadius, font for each of 8 templates

locations: ResumePreview.jsx line 50-51 (renderHtmlContent): bg:${accent} where accent=#dc2626, color:#fff
ResumePreview.jsx line 289 (plain text): bg-red-600 text-white rounded inline-block
bug_3_bold_template_headers.details: Bold template headers now have red background badge style instead of just red text

visual_template_info.selector_location: Step 4 results tab, below 'Your Improved Resume' heading
